argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const noteId = "{{ note-id }}"; history.pushState({}, '', location.href); window.dispatchEvent(new PopStateEvent('popstate')); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); return { noteId, triggered: true }; }

async (intermediate) => { const noteId = intermediate.noteId; const norm = (v) => (v || '').trim(); const domData = (() => { const sections = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.shell-container, .data-block-container')).map(container => { const containerText = norm(container.innerText); const title = containerText.includes('互动数据') ? '互动数据' : containerText.includes('基础数据') ? '基础数据' : ''; const metrics = Array.from(container.querySelectorAll('.block-container.block, .data-item, .metric-item')).map(block => ({ label: norm(block.querySelector('.des, .label, .metric-label')?.innerText), value: norm(block.querySelector('.content, .value, .metric-value')?.innerText), extra: norm(block.querySelector('.text-with-fans, .extra')?.innerText) })).filter(m => m.label && m.value); return { title, metrics }; }).filter(s => s.title && s.metrics.length > 0); const infoText = norm(document.querySelector('.note-info-content, .note-info')?.innerText); let noteTitle = ''; const pageTitle = document.title || ''; const titleMatch = pageTitle.match(/(.+) - 笔记数据详情/); if (titleMatch && titleMatch[1] && !titleMatch[1].includes('创作服务平台')) { noteTitle = titleMatch[1].trim(); } if (!noteTitle) { const noteLink = document.querySelector('a[href*="/explore/"], a[href*="/discovery/item/"]'); if (noteLink) { noteTitle = norm(noteLink.innerText) || noteLink.getAttribute('title') || ''; } } if (!noteTitle) { const notePreview = document.querySelector('.note-preview-title, .note-card .title, [class*=noteTitle]'); if (notePreview) { noteTitle = norm(notePreview.innerText); } } return { title: noteTitle || norm(document.querySelector('.note-title')?.innerText), infoText, sections }; })(); const rows = [{ section: '笔记信息', metric: 'note_id', value: noteId, extra: '' }, { section: '笔记信息', metric: 'title', value: domData.title, extra: '' }, { section: '笔记信息', metric: 'published_at', value: domData.infoText.match(/\b\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2} \d{2}:\d{2}\b/)?.[0] ?? '', extra: '' }]; const validSections = new Set(['基础数据', '互动数据']); const validMetrics = new Set(['曝光数', '观看数', '封面点击率', '平均观看时长', '涨粉数', '点赞数', '评论数', '收藏数', '分享数']); for (const section of domData.sections) { if (!validSections.has(section.title)) continue; for (const metric of section.metrics) { if (!validMetrics.has(metric.label)) continue; rows.push({ section: section.title, metric: metric.label, value: metric.value, extra: metric.extra }); } } return rows; }

description: 小红书单篇笔记详情页数据 (笔记信息 + 核心/互动数据)
name: CreatorNoteDetail

variables.name: note-id
variables.help: Note ID (from creator-notes or note-detail page URL)
